creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Jan 25, 2010 at 05:29:12PM -0500, b. f. wrote:
> On 1/25/10, wxs@freebsd.org <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Synopsis: [PATCH]graphics/plotutils: update to 2.6, add a regression-test
> > target, minor fixes
> >
> > State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> > State-Changed-By: wxs
> > State-Changed-When: Mon Jan 25 20:07:57 UTC 2010
> > State-Changed-Why:
> > Committed. Thanks!
> >
> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=143204
> >
> 
> Hmmm.  Has this really been committed?  I can't see any changes via
> 
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/graphics/plotutils/
> 
> even though the times in this message suggest that it went in several
> hours ago...

It was not committed. I meant to assign the PR to myself and ended up
closing it. My apologies for the confusion. I have re-opened it and
assigned it to myself now.

-- WXS
